_meta.description: Site navigation structure - single source of truth for all menus

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing this file
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify changes with user before committing
REVIEW the structuralItems.doNotModify list before making changes
prohibited: Do NOT make changes without user awareness
Do NOT modify top-level mainNav section labels (Visit, Events, Discover, Support)
Do NOT change utilityNav or mobileNav without explicit developer request
fileSpecific: When adding items to mainNav, ALSO add corresponding items to footerNav for consistency
When removing items from mainNav, ALSO remove from footerNav
Keep labels under 15 characters and descriptions under 50 characters
Maintain dropdown limit of 6 items per section
Use only 1-2 featured items per dropdown section
Internal links must start with / - external links use full https:// URLs
testingRules: Navigation changes should be tested in preview deployment before production
Verify all href paths point to existing pages
Check mobile menu renders correctly after changes
Test dropdown behavior after adding/removing items
syncRules: mainNav and footerNav should contain matching page references
If a page is important enough for mainNav, it should appear in footerNav
External links should have 'external': true flag set
_aiRules.whenUnsure: Ask the user for clarification, especially for structural changes

whenToEdit: Adding a new page that needs to appear in navigation
Renaming a page or changing its URL
Reordering menu items within a section
Adding a featured badge to highlight an item
whenNotToEdit: Changing page content (edit the page file instead)
Adding temporary promotions (use the events system)
Fixing broken links (contact developer - may indicate deeper issue)
staffInstructions.howToEdit: On GitHub: Navigate to data/navigation.json > Click pencil icon > Make changes > Click 'Commit changes'
staffInstructions.testingChanges: Preview deployments auto-generate - check Vercel before merging to main

mainNav.description: Primary navigation shown in header. These are the main dropdown menus.

fields.label: Text shown in the menu (keep under 15 characters)
fields.href: URL path - must start with / for internal links
fields.description: Short helper text shown in dropdown (keep under 50 characters)
fields.featured: Set to true to highlight with accent styling
fields.badge: Optional short label like 'New' or 'Limited' (keep under 10 characters)

utilityNav.description: Small links in header corner (Contact, Directions)
utilityNav.canStaffEdit: Rarely - these are structural. Ask developer first.

footerNav.description: Links organized by section in the footer

fields.external: Set to true if link opens in new tab

mobileNav.description: Call-to-action buttons shown on mobile menu
mobileNav.canStaffEdit: Rarely - these are high-priority conversion buttons

rules.urlFormat: Internal links start with / (e.g., /visit). External links use full URL (e.g., https://...)
rules.labelLength: Keep labels under 15 characters to prevent layout issues
rules.ordering: Items display in array order - first item appears first in menu
rules.dropdownLimit: Keep dropdowns under 6 items for usability
rules.featuredLimit: Only 1-2 featured items per dropdown section
rules.consistency: If you add to mainNav, also add to footerNav for discoverability

newNavItem.description: Copy this to add a new item to any dropdown

externalLink.description: Use this for links to other websites

emailLink.description: Use this for email contact links

doNotModify: Top-level mainNav sections (Visit, Events, Discover, Support) - these define site architecture
utilityNav items - these are fixed structural elements
structuralItems.askDeveloper: Contact developer before removing entire sections or changing section labels

dropdown.label: Evidence Room
dropdown.tagline: The proof is in the documents.
